#+DESCRIPTION:

* Distributed Node Initialization

This section tracks the startup handshake protocol for our ESP32-C6 cluster. 

#+begin_comment
WORK IN PROGRESS (WIP): The interactive PlantUML macro below is for local
editing and drafting. Once finalized, export this diagram to
'docs/diagrams/src/node-handshake.svg' and update the target link below.
#+end_comment

#+begin_src puml :file ../diagrams/generated/node-handshake.svg :exports results
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor transparent
autonumber

participant "Governing Node (0)" as Master
participant "Actor Node (1)" as Actor

Master -> Actor: Broadcast SYNC_INIT Packet
activate Actor
Actor -> Master: Acknowledge SYNC_ACK
deactivate Actor
@endum
#+end_src

#+caption: SPI/CAN Bus Synchronization Handshake Protocol
#+name: fig:node-handshake
[[file:../diagrams/generated/node-handshake.svg]]
